quests.name: Borrowing Sera's Mirror
quests.description:
Go talk to Heena.
You meet Heena, who was worried the sun would damage her skin. You should get a mirror from her sister, Sera, so she can check.
Heena asked you to get a mirror from her sister, so you walked all the way to Sera.

quests.name: Olaf's First Training
quests.description:
It seems like Olaf in Lith Harbor has something to say to the beginner adventurers who have just arrived on Victoria Island.
I met Olaf at Lith Harbor. Olaf mentioned that once I reach level 10, I could advance my job, but wondered if I truly had what it takes. To prove myself, Olaf gave me a task to hunt monsters outside the village. I’m feeling a bit nervous since there seem to be stronger monsters on Victoria Island...
I successfully passed Olaf's training. But is this really enough
quests.requirements: Defeat Stump x 10, Defeat Slime x 10

quests.name: Phil’s Call
quests.description:
I’ve finally reached level 10! Come to think of it, I remember hearing something about choosing a job once I hit level 10…
Let’s head to the Information Broker Phil in Lith Harbor to learn more about job advancement.
I learned from Phil that I can choose to become a Swordman, Magician, Archer, or Rogue. It seems like I can’t change it once I choose, so I need to think carefully…

quests.name: Jane and the Mushroom
quests.description:
Look for Jane in Lith Harbor.
In Lith Harbor, I met Jane, a girl wearing bunny ears. Jane says she wants to travel the world, but her dad won't let her. She thinks if I get her 15 Blue Mushroom Caps and 15 Horny Mushroom Caps, her father will change his mind.
I delivered the Blue Mushroom Caps and Horny Mushroom Caps to Jane. I wonder if this will really change her father's mind... she's wearing bunny ears, for goodness sake! Ah well, it's none of my business. In return, Jane gave me a Scroll for ATT. My weapon's going to be awesome... if the scroll works.
quests.requirements: Defeat Blue Mushroom x 30, Defeat Horny Mushroom x 30, Blue Mushroom Cap x 15, Horny Mushroom Cap x 15

rewards.name: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate
Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate

quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: One-Handed Sword Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), One-Handed Axe Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Polearm Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Bow Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Crossbow Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Claw Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Dagger Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Wand Magic Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Staff Magic Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Two-handed Sword Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Two-handed Axe Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%), Spear Attack Scroll: Intermediate (7.14%)

items.name: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate
items.label: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate

items.name: Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate
items.label: Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Intermediate

quests.name: Jane's First Challenge
quests.description:
I hear Jane's got herself a new life ambition...
Last time, I got Jane some mushroom caps and boar's teeth to convince her dad to let her travel. That didn't work. Now she has a new dream: she wants to be an alchemist! A bit fickle, but whatever. Now, she needs materials... I can guess where this is going. She wants me to collect 1 Pure Water, 25 Drake Skull, and 25 Medicine With Weird Vibes by defeating several monsters so she can make some Elixirs.
I got the materials Jane needed to make some Elixirs. If she fails... is the whole place going to blow up
quests.requirements: Defeat Copper Drake x 50, Defeat Wraith x 50, Pure Water x 1, Drake Skull x 25, Medicine With Weird Vibes x 25

quests.name: Jane's Second Challenge
quests.description:
Jane says she will make me something better.
This time, Jane promises to make a better item, so she needs me to gather 1 Mushmom Spore, 3 vials of Drake's Blood, 25 Medicine With Weird Vibes, and 25 Malady's Experimental Frogs by defeating several monsters. She says it can be used to make an even more powerful elixir…
I got Jane the materials she needed. If she does well, I'll get some nice elixirs. If not... er, I'm not sure I really want to take what she gives me...
quests.requirements: Defeat Wraith x 50, Defeat Malady x 50, Drake's Blood x 3, Mushmom Spore x 1, Medicine With Weird Vibes x 25, Malady's Experimental Frog x 25

quests.name: Jane's Final Challenge
quests.description:
Jane says she will make me something better.
For this last experiment, Jane promises to make me a mysterious Scroll. For that, she needs a Moon Rock, 20 Dragon Skins, and 10 Sap of Ancient Tree. Maybe I should ask the fairies at Ellinia for the Moon Rock...
I got the materials Jane needed and the scroll for gloves was made without a hitch. Sweet! Jane expressed a strong desire to keep experimenting. Maybe next time I return I'll be able to buy something from her that's not sold in stores...
quests.requirements: Defeat Dark Axe Stump x 100, Defeat Drake x 50, Moon Rock x 1, Dragon Skin x 20, Sap of Ancient Tree x 10
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Gloves Attack Scroll: Intermediate (25%), Gloves Attack Scroll: Greater (25%), Gloves Magic Attack Scroll: Intermediate (25%), Gloves Magic Attack Scroll: Greater (25%)

quests.name: [Deep Forest of Patience] John's Pink Flower Basket
quests.description:
Let's go meet John in Lith Harbor.
I met a fisherman named John in Lith Harbor. He wanted to get his wife a nice flower basket for their upcoming anniversary. He asked me if I could get him 10 Pink Violas for her. According to him, a Mysterious Statue can lead me to where the flower is. Sleepywood... Sleepywood That's FAR!!!
I got John all 10 Pink Violas. With these, he can make a beautiful flower basket for his wife on their anniversary. As a sign of appreciation, John got me a whole bunch of screws left over from parts of a ship. By the way, if there are this many screws that have fallen out of that ship, then how in the world is it even working... Is it still carrying passengers
quests.requirements: Pink Viola x 10

quests.name: [Deep Forest of Patience] John's Present
quests.description:
Let's go see John in Lith Harbor again.
I ran into John the fisherman again in Lith Harbor. This time, he wanted to get his wife Blue Violas for her birthday. He asked me to get 20 Blue Violas for him. The scent of Blue Viola last over 500 years... and according to John, they can be found in the Mysterious Statue again, where the flower may be found. Man... do I HAVE to go in there again
I got John all 20 Blue Violas. They have a nice scent, but 20 of them Makes my head spin... As a sign of appreciation, John gave me a nice glove he found inside the ship. I mean, it looks like someone accidentally left that glove in there... is he allowed to give it to me like that What if I wear this around town and run into its actual owner
quests.requirements: Blue Viola x 20
quests.rewards_items: Work Gloves, Dark Knuckle, Dark Arten, Dark Brace, Dark Cleave

quests.name: [Deep Forest of Patience] John's Last Present
quests.description:
I heard John has one final thing to ask me...
I ran into John the fisherman again in Lith Harbor. This time, he told me his mother passed away recently, and he wanted to get some White Violas for her. He asked me to get 30 White Violas for him. The scent of White Violas last over 1000 years... and according to John, they can be found through the Mysterious Statue again, where the flowers may be found. Man... do I HAVE to go in there again
I got John all 30 White Violas. They have a nice scent, but 30 of them Makes my head spin... As a sign of appreciation, John gave me a set of his mother's earrings. These earrings look like they are made of some common flowers, but it seems there's something to it...
quests.requirements: White Viola x 30

quests.name: Olaf's Second Training
quests.description:
It looks like Olaf in Lith Harbor has prepared another round of training.
I met Olaf again in Lith Harbor. He says my training is still far from over and gave me a mission to hunt stronger monsters outside the town. Will I finally become a true adventurer once I finish this training
I passed Olaf's second training with flying colors! Once I reach Level 10, I'll be all set to choose my job!
quests.requirements: Defeat Pig x 10, Defeat Orange Mushroom x 10

quests.name: Bringing a Mirror to Heena
quests.requirements: Sera's Mirror x 1

quests.name: Teo's Weird Hobby
quests.description:
It seems a sailor named Teo in Lith Harbor is looking for an adventurer to lend a hand.
Teo in Lith Harbor says his hobby is collecting weird things. He asked me to hunt Slimes near the town and bring back 1 Slime Bubble. He warned me that it might be hard to find!
I delivered 1 Slime Bubble to Teo in Lith Harbor. But from the look on his face, he’s already craving something else...
quests.requirements: Defeat Slime x 15, Slime Bubble x 1

quests.name: Teo's Even Weirder Hobby
quests.description:
It seems like Teo in Lith Harbor still has more weird stuff he wants to collect.
Teo from Lith Harbor is asking for even weirder items to complete his collection. He says he absolutely needs an intact Pig's Head... Why is he even collecting this kind of stuff
I delivered a Pig's Head to Teo in Lith Harbor. I guess I should keep his weird hobby a secret between us.
quests.requirements: Defeat Pig x 15, Pig's Head x 1

quests.name: Roger's Apple
quests.description:
Talk to Roger.
By pressing the hotkey I, you can consume Unknown(2001000) in the Use window. Now talk to Roger.
You learned how to use items! This will make life much easier!
quests.requirements: Roger's Apple x 1

quests.name: What Sen wants to eat
quests.description:
Talk to Nina.
Nina is wondering what to make her brother, Sen, for dinner. Go talk to Sen, who's in the house next to Nina, and ask him what he wants to eat.
You asked Sen, Nina's brother, what he wants for dinner. He said he wants Mushroom Soup.

quests.name: Todd's How-to-Hunt
quests.description:
You hear that Todd can teach you how to hunt...
Todd asks you to attack and defeat Tutorial Jr. Sentinels, then talk to Peter.
You defeated the monsters, just as Todd instructed.
quests.requirements: Defeat Tutorial Jr. Sentinel x 3, Jr. Sentinel Shellpiece x 3

quests.name: Sam's Suggestion
quests.description:
Sam has some advice for beginner adventurers...
When you talk to Sam, he tells you to head to the east and hunt 10 Snail before meeting Mai.
As Sam suggested, you hunted 10 Snails, then met Mai. Is this person a master They definitely give off a strong, powerful vibe.
quests.requirements: Defeat Snail x 10

quests.name: Letter for Lucas
quests.parent: Please bring this letter to Lucas
quests.description:
Maria needs someone to help her...
Maria needs someone to help her. She wants me to deliver a letter to Lucas in Amherst.
I delivered Maria's Letter to Lucas in Amherst.
quests.requirements: Maria's Letter x 1

quests.name: Lucas' Reply
quests.parent: Please bring this letter to Lucas
quests.requirements: Lucas' Letter x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Brown Skullcap (14.29%), Green Skullcap (14.29%), Red Headband (14.29%), Black Headband (14.29%), Green Headband (14.29%), Yellow Headband (14.29%), Blue Headband (14.29%)

quests.name: Mai's Training
quests.description:
Mai at A Split Road seems like a martial arts specialist who can train beginners.
You're under the tutelage of the famous swordmaster, Mai, in A Split Road. She wants you to hunt Blue Snails, Shrooms, and Red Snails. Ah, Mai also said to meet with Biggs in Southperry to get another quest.
Mai trained you, and you feel stronger.
quests.requirements: Defeat Blue Snail x 10, Defeat Shroom x 10, Defeat Red Snail x 5

quests.name: Mai's Final Training
quests.description:
Mai’s training is just about defeating monsters, but it seems really useful for learning how to hunt. Let’s continue with Mai’s training.
Mai believes that while knowing your abilities is important, defeating stronger monsters is also great training to improve them. They asked you to defeat Orange Mushroom. Orange Mushroom... It sounds really strong. Do you think you can defeat it
After Mai's training, you feel much, much stronger. Time to get off Maple Island! Go to Southperry and take the boat to Victoria Island.
quests.requirements: Defeat Orange Mushroom x 1

quests.name: Mrs. Ming Ming's First Worry
quests.description:
I hear that Mrs. Ming Ming in Henesys is worried about something...
I ran into Mrs. Ming Ming in Henesys, who was overcome with concern. She said there aren't enough decorations for the village festival, and asked me to bring 10 Slime Bubbles and 20 Pig's Ribbons.
I brought back all the stuff Mrs. Ming Ming asked me for, but I'm sure these decorations are not the only things needed for the festival...
quests.requirements: Slime Bubble x 10, Pig's Ribbon x 20

quests.name: Mrs. Ming Ming's Second Worry
quests.description:
I heard Mrs. Ming Ming in Henesys has a new worry...
I met Mrs. Ming Ming again in Henesys who was preparing for the village festival. She said she needs food to prepare for the festival, and asked me to collect 10 Pig's Heads, 30 Octopus Legs, and Estelle's Special Sauce. To get the special sauce, I think I'll have to go find Estelle in The Field South of Ellinia.
I met up with Estelle in The Field South of Ellinia to get her Estelle's Special Sauce, but she apparently she doesn't want to give it to me for free...

quests.name: Estelle's Request
quests.requirements: Garnet x 1

quests.name: Estelle's Special Sauce
quests.requirements: Pig's Head x 10, Octopus Leg x 30, Estelle's Special Sauce x 1

quests.name: Pia and the Blue Mushroom
quests.description:
Find Pia in Henesys Park.
Under the watchtower in Henesys Park, you see Pia, wearing a teddy bear costume. How cute! She tells you that she ran into a bully Blue Mushroom on her way to Ellinia, and now she wants you to show the rude mushroom who's boss! Collect 20 Green Mushroom Caps and 20 Blue Mushroom Caps as proof. You contemplate telling Pia she's asking to be teased, walking around the forest in a bear costume, but you decide against it.
You delivered 20 Green Mushroom Caps and 20 Blue Mushroom Caps to Pia in Henesys Park. She was thrilled that she got vengeance on the mushrooms and gave you a Scroll for hat. All you have to do is click on it in the Use tab of your Item Inventory and drag it to your helmet in the Equipment window... Oh, and you'll have to cross your fingers and hope the Scroll doesn't fail.
quests.requirements: Green Mushroom Cap x 20, Blue Mushroom Cap x 20
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Hat Accuracy Scroll: Lesser (33.33%), Hat Accuracy Scroll: Intermediate (33.33%), Hat Accuracy Scroll: Greater (33.33%)

quests.name: Camila's Gem
quests.description:
I heard that Camila in Henesys is worrying about something...
I met Camila in Henesys, and given her timid disposition, she asked me to deliver Sparkling Glass Marble to Utah for her. I heard that I can get to Utah's Pig Farm through The Forest East of Henesys...
I delivered a gift from Camila to Utah. I'm sure they're really close friends, since they give what's most precious to each other. I wish I could meet a friend like that during my journey...
quests.requirements: Sparkling Glass Marble x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: 30x Cake (70%), Pig Illustrated (30%)

quests.name: Maya of Henesys
quests.description:
I heard that Maya in Henesys is very sick...
A girl named Maya in Henesys Townstreet has been ill for a long time. It looks like she can't live a normal life at all. I agreed to help her. Weird Medicine... What a strange name! She says she'll get a little better by taking that... I should go to Lith Harbor and see this guy Teo...
Maya wanted me to go see Teo of Lith Harbor, so I did just that. He promised to give me the Weird Medicine only after I get him a Sparkling Rock. Geez, he won't even give any free medicine for a sick girl

quests.name: Arcon's Blood?
quests.requirements: Defeat Zombie Mushroom x 75, Charm of the Undead x 40

quests.name: Biggs's Collection of Items
quests.description:
Biggs in Southperry has a task for you.
You meet Biggs in Southperry. He wants you to get him 1 Orange Mushroom Cap and 10 Blue Snail Shells. He doesn't look too convinced that you can do it, but it sounds like a piece of cake.
You gathered 1 Orange Mushroom Cap and 10 Blue Snail Shells for Biggs in Southperry. The weapon he gave you as a reward was pretty decent.
quests.requirements: Blue Snail Shell x 10, Orange Mushroom Cap x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Fruit Knife (50%), Razor (50%)

quests.name: Getting Arcon's Blood
quests.requirements: Squishy Liquid x 30, Arcon's Blood x 1, Leaf x 30, Octopus Leg x 30

quests.name: Making Sparkling Rock
quests.requirements: Sparkling Rock x 1

quests.name: Delivering the Weird Medicine
quests.requirements: Weird Medicine x 1

quests.name: Luke the Security Guy
quests.description:
Let's meet Luke the Security Guy at the Henesys Dungeon Entrance.
At the dungeon entrance, I met Luke, the guard. He said he wanted to make a nourishing meal for his mother and asked me to hunt 20 Jr. Neckis and 20 Stirges, then bring back 10 Jr. Necki Skins, 10 Stirge Wings, and 1 Salad. He said he’s too busy with his guard duties... but honestly, he just looks like he’s about to fall asleep... !
I got Luke, who is protecting the entrance of the Dungeon, the stuff he asked for. Since he's making the "Snake Drink" and all... I want a taste of that myself! In return, Luke gave me a nicely refined jewel he found from around the area. It's not like refined jewels fall from the sky... did someone lose it while traveling Anyway, I should drop by later when the "Snake Drink" is ready...
quests.requirements: Defeat Jr. Necki x 20, Defeat Stirge x 20, Salad x 1, Jr. Necki Skin x 10, Stirge Wing x 10
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Diamond (12.5%), Garnet (12.5%), Amethyst (12.5%), Aquamarine (12.5%), Emerald (12.5%), Opal (12.5%), Sapphire (12.5%), Topaz (12.5%)

quests.name: Luke the Security Guy's Wish to Travel
quests.description:
I hear that Luke the Security Guy made up his mind on something...
I met Luke at the entrance of the dungeon again. The Snake Drink from back then is gone now because he and his mom drank it all... Anyway, Luke said he’s done with the boring life of a security guard and has decided to go on an adventure. To make a glove fit for the journey, Silas Irons of Perion asked for 1 Black Feather, 10 Orihalcon Ingots, 30 Drake Skulls, 20 Dragon Skins, and 20 Screws! I’m guessing he wants me to gather them for him... Oh, and apparently, the fairies of Ellinia might know something about Black Feather~
I brought Luke the materials he needed to make the gloves and received the treasured heirloom helmet, Bronze Crusader Helm, in return. It feels like I got the short end of the deal... but since it’s a family heirloom passed down for generations, I can’t really complain...
quests.requirements: Black Feather x 1, Orihalcon Ingot x 10, Screw x 20, Drake Skull x 30, Dragon Skin x 20
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Bronze Crusader Helm (100%)

quests.name: Maya's First Collection
quests.description:
Go see Maya in Henesys.
I got a request from Maya of Henesys, who has been collecting various items. She wanted 20 each of Orange Mushroom Cap, Green Mushroom Cap, Blue Mushroom Cap, and Horny Mushroom Cap. Maybe... well it looks like I can get these from the monsters around the prairie...
I got everything Maya asked for, but when do I get rewarded for this What How many more times do I have to do this
quests.requirements: Orange Mushroom Cap x 20, Green Mushroom Cap x 20, Blue Mushroom Cap x 20, Horny Mushroom Cap x 20

quests.name: Maya's Second Collection
quests.requirements: Pig's Ribbon x 20, Bubbling's Huge Bubble x 20, Fire Boar's Tooth x 20, Tablecloth x 20

quests.name: Maya's Third Collection
quests.requirements: Iron Hog's Metal Hoof x 30, Lupin Doll x 30, Cold Eye Tail x 30, Tortie Shell x 30

quests.name: Maya's Last Collection
quests.description:
Go see Maya in Henesys.
Maya asked me to gather some items: 1 Diamond, and 50 each of Stone Golem Rubble and Dark Stone Golem Rubble. Apparently, I can get them by defeating monsters at the Golem’s Temple on the way from Henesys to the Dungeon... but this is way too tough!
I got all the items Maya requested for the last time... or is it As a sign of appreciation, she gave me a cape her grandma made for Athena Pierce, the chief of this town. It may be really old, but it still looks like it's brand new!
quests.requirements: Stone Golem Rubble x 50, Dark Stone Golem Rubble x 50, Diamond x 1

quests.name: Pia's Present For a Friend
quests.description:
Let's go to Pia in Henesys.
I ran into that same teddy-bear-costume-wearing Pia at the Henesys Park. I did her a favor and took care of the Blue Mushrooms before. This time, she wants to make a claw as a present for a friend in Ellinia who wants to go out on a journey. The claw she wants to make requires 15 Silver Ingots, 30 Dragon Skins, and 30 Screws... If I get her all these... am I going to be richly rewarded
Pia asked me to get a gift for her friend who decided to set out on an adventure, and I brought it back for her. But it seems this alone isn’t enough.
quests.requirements: Silver Ingot x 15, Dragon Skin x 30, Screw x 30

quests.name: Pio's Collecting Recycled Goods
quests.description:
Pio in Amherst wants you to help collect recycled goods.
You ran into Pio, who is famous in Amherst for fixing broken goods. He asks you to break down scrap boxes from around town and bring back Rusty Screws and Old Wooden Boards.
You broke the boxes and collected supplies for Pio. It was fun because you found other useful items in the boxes as well.
quests.requirements: Rusty Screw x 3, Old Wooden Board x 3

quests.name: Looking for the Red Cape
quests.description:
Let's go to Pia in Henesys.
Pia also asked me to retrieve the Red Cape that Rina in Henesys borrowed for her friend. I’ll probably get something nice if I bring it back to her.
I went to Rina to get Pia's cape, but Rina told me that she's keeping the cape until Pia brings back what she borrowed from her. She said she will return the cape if she gets back what Pia has borrowed.

quests.name: What Pia has Borrowed
quests.description:
It seems Rina has her own reasons for not returning what she borrowed from Pia.
I went to see Rina in Henesys, and instead, she tells me she took that red cape because Pia didn't return the items she borrowed from her. She said that she would return the cape if she gets her items back... the items are 1 Black Crystal, 1 Ancient Scroll, and 30 Medicine With Weird Vibes.
I paid off Pia's debt to Rina on her behalf and received the Red Cape in return. Now I just need to bring this back to Pia, right
quests.requirements: Medicine With Weird Vibes x 30, Ancient Scroll x 1, Black Crystal x 1

quests.name: Pia’s Gift
quests.description:
It looks like Rina is ready to return the Red Cape she borrowed from Pia.
I got my hands on the Red Cape that Pia asked for. Now I just need to bring it back to her.
I delivered the materials needed to make the claw to Pia in Henesys Park and received the scroll. I wonder if Pia’s friend has already set out on their adventure by now. Who knows—maybe I’ll even run into them during my travels!
quests.requirements: Red Cape x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Cape STR Scroll: Greater (25%), Cape DEX Scroll: Greater (25%), Cape INT Scroll: Greater (25%), Cape LUK Scroll: Greater (25%)

quests.name: The Reason Behind the Mushroom Studies
quests.parent: The Reason Behind the Mushroom Studies
quests.description:
I should go see Bruce in Henesys...
I got to meet Bruce, who has been studying monsters and animals in Henesys. His bright smile and the easygoing demeanor belies the painful fact that his daughter has been missing for some time, and that he's been studying the mushroom monsters for the sake of finding clues of his daughter's whereabouts. He asks me if I can help him out, and I just can't say no to a worthy cause like this...
I helped Bruce gather up the materials necessary for his studies. Will these help him find his daughter
quests.requirements: Defeat Shroom x 20, Defeat Orange Mushroom x 20, Mushroom Spore x 10, Orange Mushroom Cap x 10
quests.rewards_items: 10x Red Potion, 2x Return Scroll to Henesys

quests.name: I Need to Find My Daughter 1
quests.parent: I Need to Find My Daughter
quests.description:
I wonder how Bruce is doing in Henesys these days...
I met up with Bruce in Henesys, and he had great news: He finally found his daughter!!! There was one problem, however... She seems to be suffering from amnesia. Bruce gave me a toy that his daughter played with while growing up, and asked me to give it to her.
I found Ayan and gave her Ayan's Toy Sword.
quests.requirements: Ayan's Toy Sword x 1
quests.next_quest_name: I Need to Find My Daughter 2

quests.name: I Need to Find My Daughter 2
quests.parent: I Need to Find My Daughter
quests.description:
It seems that Ayan, having regained her memories of the past, is eager to share the news with her father.
Amazingly, Ayan recovered from her amnesia with the help of Ayan's Toy Sword. That's just amazing! The only thing left now is for Ayan and Bruce to finally meet again. But first, I have to get this letter from Ayan to Bruce.
I'm so glad that Ayan got her memory back. I'm even gladder that Bruce got to finally see his daughter again! What a moment...
quests.requirements: Ayan's Letter x 1

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 1
quests.description:
You're not a beginner anymore. Talk to Rain in Amherst and take the Maple Quiz!
You're not a beginner anymore. Talk to Rain and take the Maple Quiz!
Rain's first question was about how to hang from a ladder or rope. Alright! up arrow key, make sure to remember it well.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 2
quests.description:
Solve Rain's second question.
What's Rain's second question
Rain's question was about equippable items, which can be worn by double-clicking on them.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 3
quests.description:
Rain's third question.
Time for Rain's thirds question.
In the Equipment Window, I can check the items I'm wearing, and I can also double-click to unequip them.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 4
quests.description:
Time to answer Rain's fourth question.
You can answer Rain's questions if you think carefully.
Rain's fourth quiz was about ways to recover HP. I didn't know there were so many different methods! When I find a chair or bench, make sure to sit down.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 5
quests.description:
Rain's fifth question. Wonder what it's about.
What's the fifth question
Rain asked about job advancements. Warriors, Thieves, Bowmen, and Magicians all need to be at least level 10 to advance.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 6
quests.description:
Time to answer Rain's question.
Finally, the sixth question.
I learned that when I level up, I get AP. If I use the AP on the stats I want, I can increase them, so I’ll make sure to remember that.

quests.name: Rain's Maple Quiz 7
quests.description:
This is Rain's last question. Excited
Finally the last question. After this, you'll no longer be a beginner.
Rain advised that it's time to leave Maple Island. In Victoria Island, you can choose a job and start a lot of new adventures. Head to Southperryto get to Victoria Island!

quests.name: Arwen and the Glass Shoe
quests.description:
Arwen the Fairy from Ellinia has lost something...
Arwen the Fairy from Ellinia says she lost Arwen's Glass Shoes a couple of days ago, on her way to Perion. A monster covered in flame stole it! Fairies obsess over glimmering, shiny objects so she obviously wants it back... Time to hunt some monsters near Perion.
I returned Arwen's Glass Shoes to Arwen the Fairy in Ellinia. I got lucky, finding it off a nasty Fire Boar. As a sign of gratitude, she gave me a fairy item. It's gorgeous and glimmers like a star. Dang, maybe I can use this to make something special.
quests.requirements: Arwen's Glass Shoes x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Piece of Ice (50%), Fairy Wing (50%)

quests.name: Collecting 50 Cursed Dolls
quests.parent: Rowen the Fairy and the Cursed Doll
quests.description:
I think Rowen the Fairy in Ellinia has something to ask me...
I ran into Rowen the Fairy again, who gave me Fresh Milk for Ronnie, Mr. Wetbottom's son. Back then, she seemed to be keeping her guard up against humans, but now, it looks like she accepts me as Ronnie's friend... Rowen the Fairy is assistant to the head magician of Ellinia, Grendel the Really Old, and she tells me that he is concerned about the Cursed Dolls that he made with his black magic a long, long time ago. The dolls had been sealed up for a while, until a bunch of Lupins took them and ran away. The Lupins have since become zombies and have been destroying the forest. To return the forest to how it was before, someone needs to take down the Zombie Lupins and take the Cursed Dolls away from them... So, I readily accepted the request to collect 50 cursed dolls, but I fear those crazy monkeys may be too much to handle...
I eliminated a bunch of Zombie Lupins in a forest near Ellinia and collected all 50 Cursed Dolls for Rowen. In return, she gave me 7 ores. I hope the forest will return to normal...
quests.requirements: Defeat Zombie Lupin x 50, Cursed Doll x 50

quests.name: First Material for Building a New House
quests.parent: Ronnie & the Fairies Building a New House
quests.description:
Let's go meet Ronnie in the woods in Ellinia.
Ronnie from the forest of Ellinia asked me a favor of gathering up materials to build a house for the newborn fairies that are to come down the road. By hunting Horny Mushrooms and Curse Eyes, I’ll need to collect 30 Horny Mushroom Caps and 30 Curse Eye Tails... I guess I can get most of these from the monsters scattered around Ellinia...
I got all the items Ronnie requested, but when do I get rewarded for this What How many more times do I have to do this
quests.requirements: Defeat Horny Mushroom x 50, Defeat Curse Eye x 50, Horny Mushroom Cap x 30, Curse Eye Tail x 30

quests.name: Second Material for Building a New House
quests.parent: Ronnie & the Fairies Building a New House
quests.description:
Meet Ronnie in the Unknown Map(105010000).
Ronnie has now asked me to collect 30 Bubbling's Huge Bubbles and Tablecloths by taking down Bubblings and Jr. Wraiths. I should be able to get them from the monsters living in the Kerning City subway. This should be no problem~
I got everything for Ronnie. Please don't tell me he wanted all these for free...!
quests.requirements: Defeat Bubbling x 50, Defeat Jr. Wraith x 50, Bubbling's Huge Bubble x 30, Tablecloth x 30

quests.name: Third Material for Building a New House
quests.parent: Ronnie & the Fairies Building a New House
quests.description:
Meet Ronnie in the Unknown Map(105010000).
Ronnie has now asked me to hunt Fire Boars and Copper Drakes and collect 30 each of Fire Boar's Tooths and Drake Skulls. I should be able to get them from the monsters around Perion. Things are starting to get a bit tricky…
I got everything for Ronnie. I'm still not getting anything How many more times do I have to do this
quests.requirements: Defeat Fire Boar x 50, Defeat Copper Drake x 50, Fire Boar's Tooth x 30, Drake Skull x 30

quests.name: Last Material for Building a New House
quests.parent: Ronnie & the Fairies Building a New House
quests.description:
Meet Ronnie in the Unknown Map(105010000).
Ronnie asked for the last time. This time he wanted 30 Cold Eye Tails, 10 Dragon Skins, and 1 Diamond by taking down Cold Eyes and Drakes. I can sort of get this, but for me to hunt at the deep parts of the Ant Tunnel… this is way too hard!!
I got all the materials Ronnie needed for the last time. Is this it For the reward, he gave me a scroll for shoes he got as a gift from the fairies, who found it somewhere around the forest. He couldn't figure out how to use the scroll, so I'm getting it... hopefully it works... haha...
quests.requirements: Defeat Cold Eye x 50, Defeat Drake x 50, Cold Eye Tail x 30, Dragon Skin x 10, Diamond x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Shoes Speed Scroll: Intermediate (50%), Shoes Speed Scroll: Greater (50%)

quests.name: I Need Help on My Homework!
quests.parent: I Need Help on My Homework!
quests.description:
Whenever I walk past Wing the Fairy in Ellinia, he seems to be asking for help. I wonder why...
Wing the Fairy of Ellinia seems to have a general disdain for humans. Definitely not the kind of attitude I expect from someone in need of help. He asked me if I can get him 10 Leafs, 10 Squishy Liquids, and 3 Slime Bubbles. He needs them so he can make a potion for his homework.
I helped Wing the Fairy of Ellinia with his homework. I have no idea how that potion works, though.
quests.requirements: Leaf x 10, Squishy Liquid x 10, Slime Bubble x 3
quests.rewards_items: 10x Blue Potion, 2x Return Scroll to Ellinia

quests.name: How to Enjoy Mushrooms
quests.description:
It looks like Shane in Ellinia is looking for an adventurer to lend a hand.
Shane in Ellinia mentioned wanting to eat a delicious mushroom dish and asked me to find some ingredients. He said Green Mushroom Caps taste especially good, so I should head out and hunt Green Mushrooms near the forest.
I gave Green Mushroom Caps to Shane in Ellinia. Can he really make a delicious meal out of this
quests.requirements: Defeat Green Mushroom x 30, Green Mushroom Cap x 15

quests.name: How to Enjoy Mushrooms Even More
quests.description:
It looks like Shane in Ellinia has another favor to ask.
Shane in Ellinia says he learned an even better way to cook Green Mushroom Caps and asked me to bring some Green Mushroom Caps, as well as a Lemon.
I delivered the Green Mushroom Caps and Lemon to Shane in Ellinia. It feels like the dish might actually taste better than the last one, doesn't it
quests.requirements: Defeat Green Mushroom x 30, Green Mushroom Cap x 15, Lemon x 1

quests.name: Alex's Request
quests.description:
There is a runaway kid named Alex in Kerning City...
On a lonely building rooftop in Kerning City, I met a boy named Alex who ran away from home because of a disagreement with his father, Chief Stan in Henesys. But Alex has become exhausted from being on the run with no money. Now he wants to return home and try to work things out with his strict, but loving, father. But he wants me to persuade his father not to punish him when he returns home. He also says he wants me to bring the Old Gold Watch his mother left him when she died as proof that I successfully persuaded his father.
As Alex requested, I looked for his father in Henesys to get Alex's mother's Old Gold Watch.

quests.name: Talking to Stan
quests.requirements: Defeat Green Mushroom x 25, Defeat Blue Mushroom x 25, Green Mushroom Cap x 15, Blue Mushroom Cap x 15

quests.name: Mother's Gold Watch
quests.requirements: Old Gold Watch x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Weighted Earrings (50%), Yellow Square (50%)

quests.name: Don Hwang's Request
quests.description:
I hear that Nella at Kerning City is the one to talk to if I'm looking for work...
I gave Nella 1000 mesos as commission for telling me about various requests from the citizens of Kerning City. The first request is from Don Hwang, the owner of the armor shop, who needs materials to craft new armor. I need to defeat 20 Orange Mushrooms and 20 Ribbon Pigs and collect 10 Orange Mushroom Caps and 10 Pig's Ribbons. It shouldn't be too hard, since Orange Mushrooms and Ribbon Pigs are commonly found near Kerning City.
I delivered what Don Hwang asked for and got bunch of Lemons in return. I wonder what kind of armor Don Hwang will make. Nella said there are many more requests I can do. I should visit Nella every once in a while.
quests.requirements: Defeat Orange Mushroom x 20, Defeat Ribbon Pig x 20, Orange Mushroom Cap x 10, Pig's Ribbon x 10
quests.rewards_items: 15x Lemon, 2x Return Scroll to Kerning City

quests.name: Shumi's Request
quests.requirements: Defeat Dark Stump x 25, Leaf x 15

quests.name: Andre's Request
quests.requirements: Defeat Octopus x 30, Octopus Leg x 20, Pure Water x 1

quests.name: Dr. Faymus's Request
quests.parent: Nella & Kerning City Citizen's Other Request
quests.requirements: Defeat Jr. Necki x 40, Defeat Horny Mushroom x 40, Jr. Necki Skin x 20, Horny Mushroom Cap x 20

quests.name: Chris's Request
quests.parent: Nella & Kerning City Citizen's Other Request
quests.requirements: Stiff Feather x 20, Leather x 20

quests.name: Cutthroat Manny's Request
quests.parent: Nella & Kerning City Citizen's Other Request
quests.requirements: Defeat Evil Eye x 50, Evil Eye Tail x 30
quests.rewards_items: Red Whitebottom Boots, Mithril War Boots, Silver Windshoes, Brown Jack Boots, Blue Lappy Boots

quests.name: Stranger's Request
quests.description:
I heard there is someone in Niora Hospital in Kerning City...
I met Jane Doe in Niora Hospital in Kerning City. Jane Doe needed to take off the bandages to see the surgery result, but there was no mirror. Jane Doe asked me to defeat 40 Stirges and collect 20 Broken Mirror Glasss...
For the Stranger I met in Niora Hospital, I actually collected Broken Mirror Glass and brought it back to her.
quests.requirements: Defeat Stirge x 40, Broken Mirror Glass x 20

quests.name: Stranger's Identity
quests.requirements: Defeat Zombie Mushroom x 50, Charm of the Undead x 25

quests.name: Proof of Companionship
quests.description:
It seems that Lakelis in Kerning City is looking for a party to take on a party quest that requires multiple adventurers to work together.
Lakelis in Kerning City asked me to challenge the party quest "First Time Together” and defeat the King Slime inside. The party quest must be attempted by a party of four adventurers, all level 21 or higher. Once the party is ready, the party leader should speak to Lakelis. Better start looking for some friends to join me.
As requested by Lakelis, my friends and I challenged the party quest "First Time Together” and defeated King Slime. When everyone works together, there’s nothing that can’t be done!
quests.requirements: Defeat King Slime x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Earring STR Scroll: Intermediate (25%), Earring DEX Scroll: Intermediate (25%), Earring INT Scroll: Intermediate (25%), Earring LUK Scroll: Intermediate (25%)

quests.name: [Construction Site B1] Shumi's Lost Coin
quests.description:
Let's start looking for Shumi in Kerning City.
I met this girl named Shumi in Kerning City. She was devastated about losing the lucky coin that she borrowed from a friend, and she asked me to find it for her. She also told me that a bunch of guys draped in white cloth took it from her in the subway, and that I might find them at the Construction Site B1, deep in the station... I should go there first...
I found the lost coin that Shumi of Kerning City was looking for, and returned it to her. A precious coin borrowed from her friend, huh... as a reward, she gave me a bunch of return scrolls... not bad at all!! She also said other items can be found at Construction Site B1... I should check it out later...
quests.requirements: Shumi's Coin x 1
quests.rewards_items: 5x Return Scroll - Nearest Town, 3x Return Scroll to Lith Harbor, 3x Return Scroll to Ellinia, 3x Return Scroll to Perion, 3x Return Scroll to Henesys, 3x Return Scroll to Kerning City, 3x Return Scroll to Sleepywood

quests.name: [Construction Site B2] Shumi's Lost Roll of Cash
quests.description:
Let's go look for Shumi in Kerning City.
I ran into Shumi again in Kerning City. She seemed really worried about how she lost her rent money because a Stirge flew over and snatched a bundle of money away from her. Man... do I have to walk back in there again... can I just pay the rent for her Anyway like last time, I need to go back in there, this time to Construction Site B2 and find the bundle of money she lost. Aye, better go in there now...
I got Shumi from Kerning City the lost bundle of money. Guess she can pay her rent now... and as a reward, she got me 30 Blue Potions... She also said I can find other items at the Construction Site B2... I should go check it out sometime...
quests.requirements: Shumi's Roll of Cash x 1

quests.name: [Construction Site B3] Shumi's Lost Sack of Cash
quests.description:
Let's go look for Shumi in Kerning City.
I ran into Shumi again at Kerning City. A while ago, she got a favor from JM From tha Streetz to get some Screws for him, only to have the sack of money fall down and lose everything in the process. I guess I can find the sack of money in the deep part of the subway station, the Construction Site B3, again.
I found Shumi's lost Money Sack in the Kerning City subway. Shumi can now buy what JM From tha Streetz asked for. I received mesos and some potions as a gift. I should go to Construction Site B3 in the subway to look for more stuff.
quests.requirements: Shumi's Sack of Cash x 1

quests.name: I'm Bored 1
quests.description:
I should go see Icarus, who's at the top of a building in Kerning City. He seems to be bored out of his mind.
I got to talk to Icarus in Kerning City. Just what exactly is he doing staring aimlessly at the sky anyway He seemed to be really bored, and asked me if I can answer his questions.
I answered all the questions that Icarus of Kerning City asked. That was easy.

quests.name: I'm Bored 2
quests.description:
I answered all the questions that Icarus of Kerning City asked. That was easy.
I answered all of Icarus's questions, but he still seemed bored out of his mind. He asked me if I could get him a toy that he could play around with.
I had fun playing around with Icarus.
quests.requirements: Tree Branch x 12, Squishy Liquid x 12

quests.name: Icarus's Hang Glider
quests.description:
Apparently there's someone in Kerning City by the name of Icarus that stands on top of a building just staring at the sky 24/7.
I got to meet Icarus on top of a building at Kerning City. He seems like a nice guy who has an unquenchable thirst for flying, and he wants to create a hang glider to fulfill his dream of flying. He asks me if I can gather up the materials for the hang glider, and even though the process of making the hang glider seems dubious at best, I can't say no to his sincere desire to fly. I'll need to get him 30 Stirge Wings, 10 Processed Woods, and 15 Stiff Feathers.
I got the materials needed for Icarus to make the hang glider and realize his dream of flying. I just wonder if Stirge wings are enough to make the hang glider. I don't know if this will really work, but he might end up succeeding, so I should check up on him around the time the hang glider should be ready to take flight.
quests.requirements: Processed Wood x 10, Stirge Wing x 30, Stiff Feather x 15

quests.name: Icarus and the Balloon
quests.description:
I wonder how Icarus's doing with the hang glider... Maybe I should go check up on him in Kerning City.
Icarus failed to create a working hang glider, and is now attempting to create a flying balloon on his never-ending quest for flight. This looks just as preposterous as his last attempt, but I don't think I can stop him. To make the flying balloon, he needs 50 Tablecloths and 10 Alligator Skin Pouchs. Hope this works...
I got the materials needed for Icarus to make the flying balloon and realize his dream of flying. I don't know if his "flying balloon" will actually fly, but there's a chance that it might work. I'll check up on him around when the flying balloon should be ready to take flight and see if he's for real this time.
quests.requirements: Alligator Skin Pouch x 10, Tablecloth x 50

quests.name: In search of Wing the Fairy
quests.description:
I wonder how Icarus's doing with the flying balloon... Maybe I should go check up on him in Kerning City.
Icarus failed to make the flying balloon, but his never-ending quest for flight continues. This time he wants to deviate from a scientific approach to flight and opt for a magical approach, and asks me to see his best friend Wing the Fairy in Ellinia, the town of fairies. Apparently Wing the Fairy knows how to make Flying Medicine... I'll need to see that fairy in Ellinia for Icarus's sake.
Wing the Fairy in Ellinia seemed to dislike humans so much that he wouldn’t even listen to what I had to say.
quests.next_quest_name: The Ingredients for the Flying Pill

quests.name: The Ingredients for the Flying Pill
quests.description:
It doesn’t seem easy to talk to Wing the Fairy.
I met Wing the Fairy in Ellinia, and he doesn't seem to like people in general. How is he best friends with Icarus in the first place Anyway, he says in order to make the Flying Medicine, he's going to need 50 Medicine With Weird Vibes and 20 Witchgrass Leafs. So that's all it takes
As Wing the Fairy asked, I got him Medicine With Weird Vibes and Witchgrass Leafs. Can he make Flying Medicine with these
quests.requirements: Medicine With Weird Vibes x 50, Witchgrass Leaf x 20

quests.name: Delivering the Flying Pill
quests.description:
It looks like the Flying Medicine that will finally fulfill Icarus’s dream has been completed.
Wing the Fairy of Ellinia asked me to take the Flying Medicine to Icarus. So this little pill is all it takes to fly I need to get this to Icarus ASAP.
I got Icarus the Flying Medicine that Wing the Fairy of Ellinia made. I hope it works for him.
quests.requirements: Flying Medicine x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Green Icarus Cape (33.33%), Yellow Icarus Cape (33.33%), Blue Icarus Cape (33.33%)

quests.name: Fixing Blackbull's House
quests.description:
I heard that "Blackbull" in Perion is fixing up his house.
Right here, in this dusty town of Perion, I ran into an oddly-dressed man named "Blackbull." He told me he needs to fix his house and wondered if I could help him out by defeating 20 Stumps and 20 Dark Stumps and getting him 10 Tree Branches and 10 Leafs. If I do him a favor, I'll get a nice shield from him, but what if I say no I wouldn't... be... EATEN BY HIM... no I really hope not...
I got "Blackbull" of Perion 10 Tree Branches and 10 Leafs after defeating 20 Stumps and 20 Dark Stumps. With these, he can finally fix his house. I got this shield as a reward... and... well, scratch marks here and there, and it looks pretty old... is this even usable
quests.requirements: Defeat Stump x 20, Defeat Dark Stump x 20, Tree Branch x 10, Leaf x 10
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Wooden Buckler (90%), Steel Shield (10%)

quests.name: Building a New House For Blackbull
quests.description:
I heard that "Blackbull" in Perion is building a new house...
I ran into "Blackbull" again, the guy whose house I helped fix. He was surprised at how strong I looked and asked me for a much harder favor. His cousins from Henesys are all trying to move to Perion, so he needs to build a new house! To build a new house, he said he needed 100 Stone Golem Rubbles, 30 Screws, 30 Processed Wood, and "Blackbull's" deed to the land. His son had the deed to the land, but it was stolen by Curse Eyes near Sleepywood... hmmm... I should be looking for those wandering around the deep forest...
So that all of "Blackbull's" cousins could move to Perion, I got him the items he requested. It was really tough, and I hope he doesn't ask me to BUILD a house for him next time...
quests.requirements: Stone Golem Rubble x 100, Screw x 30, Processed Wood x 30, "Blackbull's" deed to the land x 1

rewards.name: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater
Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater

quests.rewards_items:
Pick one (class-specific):
Warrior: Spear Attack Scroll: Greater, Polearm Attack Scroll: Greater, One-Handed Sword Attack Scroll: Greater, One-Handed Axe Attack Scroll: Greater, One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater, Two-handed Sword Attack Scroll: Greater, Two-handed Axe Attack Scroll: Greater, Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater
Magician: Wand Magic Attack Scroll: Greater, Staff Magic Attack Scroll: Greater
Bowman: Bow Attack Scroll: Greater, Crossbow Attack Scroll: Greater
Thief: Dagger Attack Scroll: Greater, Claw Attack Scroll: Greater

items.name: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater
items.label: One-Handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater

items.name: Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater
items.label: Two-handed Blunt Weapon Attack Scroll: Greater

quests.name: Old Gladius
quests.description:
Find Manji in Perion.
I came across Manji again, whom I had first met in Perion when making the medicine for Maya, the little girl in Henesys. Surprised at how much stronger I had become, Manji asked me for a favor. Long ago, when he was in danger of being struck down by Balrog, he was saved by the legendary hero Tristan, who died in his place. Ever since then, Manji had held onto Tristan’s sword. But the blade, corrupted by Balrog’s evil aura, has become so worn down that it can hardly even be called a sword anymore… Manji handed me the Old Gladius he had been keeping and asked me to awaken it back to its true form. Once fully awakened, it is said to become the Hero's Gladius. Just as Manji said, I should seek out Chrishrama in Sleepywood.
I met Chrishrama in Sleepywood and was able to ask him how to awaken the Old Gladius.
quests.requirements: Old Gladius x 1

quests.name: Reawakening the Gladius
quests.description:
See Chrishrama in Sleepywood to awaken the Old Gladius.
I showed Chrishrama Manji's Old Gladius, and he claimed to have made it himself. He said he needs 1 Star Rock, 1 Piece of Ice, 1 Ancient Scroll, and 1 Flaming Feather to awaken it. Unfortunately, I've never heard of any of those items... He recommended talking to Mike in Perion Dungeon Entrance to find them.
I gathered the materials needed for the awakening and took them to Chrishrama. Chrishrama used the materials to reawaken the Old Gladius into the Hero's Gladius. It's a nice sword radiating a mysterious light... It's a shame I have to give it to Manji.
quests.requirements: Star Rock x 1, Piece of Ice x 1, Ancient Scroll x 1, Flaming Feather x 1

quests.name: Hero's Gladius
quests.description:
After much hardship, I finally managed to gather all the materials Chrishrama asked for. Now, I can only trust in his power.
With Chrishrama’s help, I was able to awaken the Old Gladius entrusted by Manji into the Hero's Gladius. All that remains is to return the sword to Manji.
It seems that this Hero's Gladius which Manji told me about is one fine sword. I had to make a hard decision choosing between the Hero's Gladius and the Skull Earrings that Manji offered me, but I will not regret my choice.
quests.requirements: Hero's Gladius x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Pick one:
Any Class: Hero's Gladius, Skull Earrings

quests.name: Searching for Fossils
quests.description:
I heard that Winston the archeologist is searching for something in the Rocky Mountains on the east side of Perion...
Winston, the archeologist who I ran into in the rocky mountains on the east side of Perion, said he lost the fossils he collected near Perion. He asked me to bring back 12 Animal Fossils and 12 Plant Fossils that were taken by Green Mushrooms and Axe Stumps. How can he lose something so important like that He's more careless than he looks...
I found the fossils that Winston lost.
quests.requirements: Defeat Green Mushroom x 25, Defeat Axe Stump x 25, Plant Fossil x 12, Animal Fossil x 12

quests.name: Delivering a Box of Fossils
quests.description:
It seems the archaeologist Winston in the Rocky Mountains on the East side of Perion has another request.
Winston the Archeologist said that it is not safe to leave the valuable fossils in the tent. He asked me to take the fossils and deliver them to Dr. Betty in Ellinia. He also wrote a letter of introduction for me to show her.
Winston the Archeologist in Perion said that it is not safe to leave the valuable fossils in his tent. He asked me to deliver them to Dr. Betty in Ellinia. Dr. Betty said she's going to be really busy from now, and she asked me to stop by again and give her a hand afterwards. Fossils huh... Should I give it a try
quests.requirements: Winston's Recommendation x 1, Fossil Box x 1

quests.name: Research on Plant Fossils
quests.description:
Dr. Betty, a biologist near Ellinia, is looking for an assistant.
Dr. Betty asked me to work as an assistant for a while. My first task from her is to collect 20 Plant Samples. I can see various plants covering the woods in Ellinia.
My first job as Dr. Betty's assistant was to collect some plants in the woods in Ellinia and sample them. It wasn't that hard, I guess.
quests.requirements: Plant Sample x 20

quests.name: Research on Animal Fossils
quests.description:
It seems the biologist Dr. Betty near Ellinia has another request.
Dr. Betty in Ellinia told me that she needs 1 Stuffed Drake Skull for her research. She asked me to find her daughter near Henesys, and bring it back to her. Where would Anne be
I met Dr. Betty's daughter, Anne, playing near Henesys by herself.

quests.name: Transporting Drake's Skull
quests.description:
It looks like Anne has the item that Dr. Betty needs.
I received the Stuffed Drake Skull from Anne, Dr. Betty's daughter. Now I have to deliver this carefully to Dr. Betty...
I collected some Plant Samples and a Stuffed Drake Skull to help Dr. Betty's research on fossils. I can't wait to see the results... I should go and see Dr. Betty, because she said she would tell me when I go back.
quests.requirements: Stuffed Drake Skull x 1

quests.name: Progress on Fossil Research
quests.description:
I heard Dr. Betty has finished her fossil research. Maybe I should go and see the results.
I met Dr. Betty again. She told me the research was finished and explained it to me, then asked me to take the research report and deliver it to Dr. Winston in Perion. Dr. Betty also informed me that if I take 20 Leafs, 15 Firewoods, 1 Stump's Teardrop, and 1 pair of Weighted Earrings, Dr. Winston would be really happy.
I delivered Dr. Betty's Fossil Report to Dr. Winston in Perion. Along with the report, I also gave him the Leafs, Firewoods, Stump's Teardrop, and Weighted Earrings. In return, Dr. Winston gave me the Leaf Earrings.
quests.requirements: Leaf x 20, Firewood x 15, Fossil Report x 1, Stump's Teardrop x 1, Weighted Earrings x 1

quests.name: The Stump Horror Story
quests.description:
Ayan of Perion says she can't take one step out of town. I wonder why...
I met Ayan in Perion. Apparently, she cannot remember anything about her childhood, and she lives everyday in fear of Stumps. She's so scared that she can't even dare to look at them. Due to this paralyzing fear of Stumps, she cannot take one step out of Perion, and asks me to take them out for her sake. Are they really THAT scary
I took out Stumps for Ayan's sake in Perion. She can finally venture outside without having to worry about them!
quests.requirements: Defeat Stump x 30

quests.name: Taking Out the Alligators 1
quests.description:
I heard something happened to the tribespeople of Perion. I should go ask Ayan about this.
I met up with Ayan in Perion. She told me that a few days ago, a group of tribespeople went hunting in the swamp and wound up being ambushed by a group of alligators. She was worried about the sudden surge of alligators taking over the swamp and asked me to reduce their numbers before they spawn out of control. I'll have to kill 100 Ligators and 40 Jr. Neckis and pick up 20 Jr. Necki Skins along the way.
The tribespeople of Perion got ambushed by the alligator herd at the swamp, so Ayan asked if I could help take care of the alligators. I responded by taking out 100 Ligators and 40 Jr. Neckis. Hopefully this will bring some peace back to the swamp.
quests.requirements: Defeat Jr. Necki x 40, Defeat Ligator x 100, Jr. Necki Skin x 20

quests.description:
Ayan of Perion is desperately looking for me. Is something wrong
I found Ayan, and she seemed to be panicking. She was walking around the swamp when she ran into a bigger, stronger, and more dangerous group of alligators than the previous one. She ran back to Perion and has been looking for me to ask me for help ever since. This time, I'll need to kill 120 Crocos and bring back 50 Croco Skins along the way.
At Ayan's request, I took out 120 Crocos in the swamp. I'll have to revisit that spot from time to time and take out the alligators before they spawn out of control.

quests.name: A Clue to the Secret Book
quests.description:
I heard Mr. Wetbottom in Sleepywood is going through hard times... I should go check on him.
At the VIP sauna in Sleepywood, I met this bald man called Mr. Wetbottom. He has a son, and apparently he ran away from home one day with a book that he cares deeply for. He requested that I find his son and get the book back from him. For a reward, he's offering me a nice sauna robe. He also told me his son Ronnie hangs out at a tree tunnel around Ellinia, so maybe I can find him there. Anyway, is that book more important to him than his son What kind of a book is it anyway...
I found Ronnie in the tree tunnel of Ellinia, as requested by Mr. Wetbottom, whom I met at the VIP Sauna.

quests.name: Hungry Ronnie
quests.requirements: Defeat Lupin x 50, Lupin's Banana x 30

quests.name: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Diet Medicine
quests.parent: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Mysterious Medicine
quests.description:
Let's go look for Sabitrama in Sleepywood.
In front of the Sleepywood Hotel, I met Sabitrama, a medicinal herb trader who seems to be the younger brother of Chrishrama. He said he found a place where he can finally find the herb that he needed for this medicine he's working on... and he asked if I could go in that forest and grab an herb called Pink Anthurium. It consists of green grass and a small pink flower... I should remember this well and get him the exact same one. I heard the place is near Ellinia... I should go there and talk to this guy Shane...
Thankfully I got the flower that Sabitrama wanted from the Forest of Patience, and as a sign of appreciation, he gave me a scroll for overall armor. Oh, and he also said that from here on out, I can enter the Forest of Patience without having to pay Shane of Ellinia. From what I've heard, the diet medicine Sabitrama's working on is for Shane's fiance... I better get back in the Forest of Patience when I have some time...
quests.requirements: Pink Anthurium x 1
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Overall Armor DEF Scroll: Intermediate (50%), Overall Armor DEF Scroll: Greater (50%)

quests.name: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama's Anti-Aging Medicine
quests.parent: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Mysterious Medicine
quests.description:
I heard that Sabitrama in Sleepywood is making a new medicine...
I ran into Sabitrama again in front of the Sleepywood Hotel, the same one I helped get herbs before. This time, he said he found a place where I can get an important herb that he needed for his new medicine. He asked me if I could go into that forest and grab Double-Rooted Red Ginseng for him. It was a reddish root split in two... I should remember it well and find the same one once I get to the top. The herb is in the forest owned by Shane of Ellinia, whom I visited last time...
Thankfully I got the herb that Sabitrama asked me to get, and for that, I got rewarded with a mysterious rock. And from here on out, I don't have to pay Shane every time I go in the Forest of Patience. From what I hear, that anti-aging medicine Sabitrama is working on may be what Shane needed... if I have time, I should go back in there...
quests.requirements: Double-Rooted Red Ginseng x 1

quests.name: Zelya's Map
quests.description:
The cave fairy Zelya in the Forgotten Hollow seems to have a request. But even finding where the Forgotten Hollow is located may be a challenge in itself...
The cave fairy Zelya in the Forgotten Hollow explained that she once lived much deeper inside the cave. She longs to return to her old home, but while out on a walk she was attacked by Glowshrooms and dropped the map she had drawn to find her way back. The monsters may have already torn it to pieces, but if I defeat the Glowshrooms east of Forgotten Hollow and gather the fragments, she might be able to figure something out.
As the cave fairy Zelya requested, I defeated the monsters and brought back the fragments of the map to her original home. Hopefully some clues can still be found within them...
quests.requirements: Zelya’s Map Fragment x 25

quests.name: Natural Adhesive
quests.description:
The cave fairy Zelya in the Forgotten Hollow seems to have a new request.
The cave fairy Zelya in the Forgotten Hollow was struggling to piece together the fragments of her map. To restore it, she asked me to bring her Raffle Petals, which can be obtained by defeating Raffles east of the village. Looks like that’s where I'll need to go.
As Zelya requested, I defeated Raffles and gathered enough Raffle Petals to bring back to her.
quests.requirements: Defeat Raffle x 50, Raffle Petal x 25

quests.name: The Road Back Home
quests.description:
The cave fairy Zelya in Forgotten Hollow seems to have yet another request.
Zelya restored her precious map and tried to follow it back to her old home, but she could not make it past the fierce monsters blocking the way. She asked me to defeat the monsters west of the Forgotten Hollow to help her get home safely.
As Zelya requested, I defeated Aqumanders and Echopuses. Yet it felt as though monsters continued to pour out from deeper within the cave. What on earth could be happening inside
quests.requirements: Defeat Aqumander x 50, Defeat Echopus x 50
quests.rewards_items:
Weighted random:
Any Class: Earring STR Scroll: Greater (25%), Earring DEX Scroll: Greater (25%), Earring INT Scroll: Greater (25%), Earring LUK Scroll: Greater (25%)

quests.name: Old Friends
quests.description:
Myra in Perilous Descent I seems to be overcome with grief.
Myra in Perilous Descent I wants her changed companions to rest in peace. At her request, I must put down the nearby Myewood, as well as the Sporewood deeper in the cave.
Following Myra’s plea, I had no choice but to fell the creatures that were once her companions. How did they end up like this...
quests.requirements: Defeat Myewood x 50, Defeat Sporewood x 30

quests.name: Myra’s Old Friend
quests.description:
Myra in Perilous Descent I seems to have another request.
Myra in Perilous Descent I asked me to deliver news of this place to another of her old friends, Grendel the Really Old. I should be able to find Grendel the Really Old atop Ellinia, at the Magic Library.
When I met Grendel the Really Old in Ellinia, he was astonished to hear that the Forgotten Hollow had been rediscovered, and he seemed deeply troubled about what was happening there.
quests.requirements: Ominous Rotten Branch x 1

quests.name: Special Taste of Florina Beach I
quests.description:
A beautiful girl by the name of Riel from Florina Beach seems to be in need of help...
Riel introduced me to a part time job, where I have to collect 10 Coconuts. Why don't I start collecting those delicious looking Coconuts over there on the right
I brought back fresh Coconuts just like Riel said. Riel told me I can come back for work anytime I want. I guess I won't be starving here in Florina Beach.
quests.requirements: Coconut x 10

quests.name: Special Taste of Florina Beach II
quests.description:
Riel in Florina Beach asks me a question about Florina Beach. Piece of cake~ I can answer that before I start my work.
I have to prepare enough ingredients for 15 people, and bring them to Riel in Florina Beach.
I answered all the questions that Riel gave me and passed her tests, then went to collect ingredients for 15 people.
quests.requirements: Coconut x 15, Lupin's Banana x 15, Lorang Claw x 30

quests.name: Special Taste of Florina Beach III
quests.description:
It seems that Riel in Florina Beach wants to ask for another favor.
I have to bring ingredients for 30 people to Riel in Florina Beach.
I worked part-time gathering ingredients for cooked meals for the tourists coming to Florina Beach.
quests.requirements: Coconut x 30, Lupin's Banana x 30, Lorang Claw x 60, Clang Claw x 60

quests.name: Special Taste of Florina Beach IV
quests.description:
Riel is trying to develop a special dish in Florina Beach.
I need to collect some ingredients to develop the Special Taste of Florina Beach. I heard that 10 Coconuts, 10 Lorang Claws, 10 Clang Claws, and 10 Lupin's Bananas are necessary. Will Valen's new recipe succeed~
I'm familiar with working in Florina Beach. I visited Riel one more time and helped her out. Why is she so desperate to help Valen
quests.requirements: Coconut x 10, Lupin's Banana x 10, Lorang Claw x 10, Clang Claw x 10

quests.name: The Warrior's Next Journey
quests.description:
Having reached level 30 and mastered the way of the Swordsman, I feel the urge to learn even more.
Perhaps Dances with Balrog of Perion could teach me greater lessons.
Perion’s Dances with Balrog seemed surprised to see how much stronger I had become compared to before.

quests.name: Finding the Instructor
quests.description:
It seemed like Dances with Balrog in Perion wanted to test whether I was worthy of receiving his teachings.
Perion’s Dances with Balrog handed me a letter and told me to deliver it to Warrior Job Instructor, who can be found somewhere in West Rocky Mountain IV. He said I’d be able to learn more details there.
In West Rocky Mountain IV, I met Warrior Job Instructor. He said he would test whether I was worthy of making the 2nd job advancement. Great! I told him I was ready for anything!
quests.requirements: Dances with Balrog's Letter x 1

quests.name: Test of Qualification
quests.description:
West Rocky Mountain IV’s Warrior Job Instructor seems ready to give me a test to prove whether I deserve to become stronger.
West Rocky Mountain IV’s Warrior Job Instructor gave me a mission to enter a hidden area, defeat the monsters there, and collect a certain item.
I passed Warrior Job Instructor’s test in West Rocky Mountain IV!
quests.requirements: Dark Marble x 30

quests.name: Proof of Qualification
quests.description:
Now that I’ve passed Warrior Job Instructor’s test, my strength should be proven!
I received The Proof of a Hero for successfully passing the Warrior Job Instructor’s test. I should return to Dances with Balrog in Perion.
Dances with Balrog in Perion welcomed me warmly, and I gained a new job, obtaining even greater power!
quests.requirements: The Proof of a Hero x 1

quests.name: [Event] A Strange and Familiar Wood
quests.description:
Look for Arwen the Fairy in Ellinia. It seems she has a favor to ask me.
Let's take the Strange Mushroom Spore Strange Mushroom Spore given by Arwen the Fairy to Grendel the Really Old for analysis. Then talk to Arwen the Fairy again.
I informed Arwen the Fairy about the results of Grendel the Really Old's analysis on the Strange Mushroom Spore Strange Mushroom Spore.

quests.name: [Event] Beyond the Unknown
quests.description:
Arwen the Fairy in Ellinia wants to speak with me again about the Strange Mushroom Spore Strange Mushroom Spore found last time.
As requested by Arwen the Fairy, let's head to The Tree Tunnel At the Forest Up North to find the strange cave entrance and investigate the surroundings.
I delivered the Glowing Mushroom Glowing Mushroom found at the cave entrance to Arwen the Fairy.
quests.requirements: Glowing Mushroom x 1

quests.name: [Event] The One Who Sealed the Darkness
quests.description:
Grendel the Really Old has something to say about the newly discovered bizarre cave entrance...
Grendel the Really Old is worried that there might be a problem with the World Tree and told me to go ask Manji in Perion.
I couldn't get any answers from Manji... but I was able to see the battle he fought beneath the World Tree.

quests.name: [Event] Gathering Leaves
quests.description:
The Maple Administrator in Henesys has something to say regarding the mysterious letters dropping from monsters lately.
I need to collect the mysterious letters dropped by monsters Lv. 10 and above such as Ribbon Pig, Dark Stump, Octopus and Green Mushroom.. Maple Administrator in Henesys will exchange them for a helpful gift for my adventure...
I collected all the mysterious letters and exchanged them for a gift today. Let's visit Maple Administrator in Henesys again tomorrow.
quests.requirements: Letter L x 1, Letter E x 1, Letter A x 1, Letter F x 1, Letter P x 1, Letter O x 1, Letter I x 1, Letter N x 1, Letter T x 1, Letter S x 1

quests.name: [Event] Gift for the New Journey
quests.description: There is a gift prepared for those setting off on a new adventure in Classic World...

quests.name: "Mar" the Fairy and the Water of Life
Make a Match Cards Set
quests.parent: Maple World's Unique Fun: Match Cards
quests.description:
It seems that Casey in Henesys Park knows a way to find a different kind of fun in Maple World.
Casey, whom I met in Henesys Park, said he knows a way to enjoy myself when I get tired of hunting, and asked me to collect Monster Cards. He said I could easily get them by defeating any of these monsters scattered across Maple World: Blue Snail, Pig, Ribbon Pig, Octopus, Blue Mushroom, Horny Mushroom, Evil Eye, Curse Eye, Lupin, Cold Eye, Lorang, Tortie, Wraith, Drake, Wild Kargo. I should try to gather them when I have the time.
I brought the requested items to Casey in Henesys Park and received a Set of Match Cards! With this, I can play the Match Cards mini-game with other adventurers anywhere! I should remember to ask Casey if I want to know more about the mini-game.
quests.requirements: Monster Card x 15

quests.name: Make a Slime & Mushroom Omok Set
quests.description:
It seems that Casey in Henesys Park knows a way to find a different kind of fun in Maple World.

I brought the requested items to Casey in Henesys Park and received a Slime & Mushroom Omok Set! With this, I can play the Omok mini-game with other adventurers anywhere! I should remember to ask Casey if I want to know more about the mini-game.
quests.requirements: Omok Table x 1, Omok Piece: Slime x 1, Omok Piece: Mushroom x 1

quests.name: Silas Irons in Need of an Apprentice
quests.description:
The master blacksmith of Perion, Silas Irons, seems to be looking for someone worthy of becoming his apprentice.
The master blacksmith of Perion, Silas Irons, has given me a test to see if I’m fit to become his apprentice. He says a blacksmith needs proper strength and knowledge, and told me to defeat monsters around Perion and bring back raw ore. It looks like raw ore can be obtained from monsters.
I passed the test given by Silas Irons, the master blacksmith of Perion. Does this mean I can become a true blacksmith in Maple World
quests.requirements: Defeat Stump x 20, Defeat Dark Stump x 20, Bronze Ore x 5

quests.name: A Blacksmith in My Own Right!
quests.description:
It looks like Silas Irons, the master blacksmith of Perion, is finally ready to acknowledge my skills.
Silas Irons, the master blacksmith of Perion, was impressed by how much I’ve grown and suggested I show off my abilities. I need to defeat Dark Axe Stumps and Zombie Mushrooms, then create an Orihalcon Ingot and a Gold Ingot, and bring them back to him.
Silas Irons, the master craftsman of Perion, was amazed by my work and handed me a Equipment Crafting Stimulator. It seems to be a special item that can alter the stats of equipment when used during crafting. Maybe I should give it a try.
quests.requirements: Defeat Dark Axe Stump x 30, Defeat Zombie Mushroom x 30, Orihalcon Ingot x 1, Gold Ingot x 1

quests.name: Silas Irons in Need of Help
quests.description:
It looks like Silas Irons, the master blacksmith of Perion, needs some help. Maybe I should go check in on him.
Silas Irons, the master blacksmith of Perion, received an important request but is struggling because he’s short on materials. To help him, I need to defeat Bubblings and bring back Mithril Ingot.
I delivered the items Silas Irons requested without any issues. At this rate, I might really be considered a fine apprentice.
quests.requirements: Defeat Bubbling x 25, Mithril Ingot x 1

quests.name: Mr. Thunder in Need of an Apprentice
quests.description:
It seems Mr. Thunder, the master weapon craftsman of Perion, is looking for someone worthy of becoming his apprentice.
Mr. Thunder, the master weapon craftsman of Perion, gave me a test when I asked to become his apprentice. He said that weaponcrafting requires proper strength and knowledge, and told me to use my Smithing skill to craft one Bronze Ingot and one Iron Ingot.
